title: Multi-region DB replica lag
scenario_context: Write to primary, read from replica. Lag visible.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Sticky session to primary too long
what_breaks_naive_approach: User saves, refreshes, doesn't see change.
reasoning: After write, route subsequent reads from same user to primary for N seconds. Or read-your-writes via session token.

// Frontend contract for e2e-341: render the user-visible state, drive it through real interactions, and assert accessible output.
